positive: Mid-century modern geometric pattern featuring stylized desert cacti, sun rays, and abstract mountains. Limited color palette of burnt orange, teal, mustard yellow, and cream. Flat design, clean lines, atomic age aesthetic, repeating pattern, vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, gradients, grunge, messy
